name: 3D Cube Rotation
description: Stunning 3D cube rotation with CSS transforms using custom component

RotatingCube.code: function RotatingCube(props) { const rotationX = (props.frame / props.fps) * 30; const rotationY = (props.frame / props.fps) * 40; const size = 300; const perspective = 1200; const cubeStyle = { position: 'relative', width: size + 'px', height: size + 'px', transformStyle: 'preserve-3d', transform: 'rotateX(' + rotationX + 'deg) rotateY(' + rotationY + 'deg)', transition: 'transform 0.1s' }; const faceStyle = { position: 'absolute', width: size + 'px', height: size + 'px', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', fontSize: '42px', fontWeight: 'bold', color: 'white', border: '3px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)', boxShadow: 'inset 0 0 60px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)', backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)' }; const faces = [ { label: props.label1, transform: 'rotateY(0deg) translateZ(' + (size/2) + 'px)', background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(138,43,226,0.8), rgba(75,0,130,0.8))' }, { label: props.label2, transform: 'rotateY(90deg) translateZ(' + (size/2) + 'px)', background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,0,150,0.8), rgba(200,0,100,0.8))' }, { label: props.label3, transform: 'rotateY(180deg) translateZ(' + (size/2) + 'px)', background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,150,255,0.8), rgba(0,100,200,0.8))' }, { label: props.label4, transform: 'rotateY(-90deg) translateZ(' + (size/2) + 'px)', background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,200,0,0.8), rgba(200,150,0,0.8))' }, { label: props.label5, transform: 'rotateX(90deg) translateZ(' + (size/2) + 'px)', background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,255,150,0.8), rgba(0,200,100,0.8))' }, { label: props.label6, transform: 'rotateX(-90deg) translateZ(' + (size/2) + 'px)', background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,100,0,0.8), rgba(200,50,0,0.8))' } ]; return React.createElement('div', { style: { perspective: perspective + 'px', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', width: '100%', height: '100%' } }, React.createElement('div', { style: cubeStyle }, ...faces.map((face, i) => React.createElement('div', { key: i, style: { ...faceStyle, transform: face.transform, background: face.background } }, face.label)))); }
RotatingCube.description: 3D rotating cube with customizable face labels

RadialGlow.code: function RadialGlow(props) { const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(props.frame * 0.05) * 0.15; const opacity = 0.3 + Math.sin(props.frame * 0.08) * 0.15; return React.createElement('div', { style: { width: '600px', height: '600px', borderRadius: '50%', background: 'radial-gradient(circle, rgba(138,43,226,' + opacity + ') 0%, rgba(138,43,226,0) 70%)', transform: 'scale(' + pulseScale + ')', filter: 'blur(40px)' } }); }
